foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Most CBD stones are secondary, migrating from the gallbladder; understanding gallstone pathogenesis explains stone composition and recurrence

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Choledocholithiasis is the prototype cause of surgical obstructive jaundice; the diagnostic workup algorithm directly applies

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: CBD anatomy, its relationship to the portal vein and hepatic artery, and the ampulla of Vater are essential for understanding stone impaction sites and ERCP

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: CBD stone obstruction with bacterial superinfection causes ascending cholangitis — the most dangerous complication requiring emergency ERCP

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Cholecystitis and choledocholithiasis frequently coexist; management strategy depends on whether CBD stones are present at cholecystectomy

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Post-ERCP or post-surgical biliary stricture is a differential for recurrent obstructive symptoms after CBD stone clearance

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: CBD exploration and ERCP carry risk of bile duct injury; recognizing and managing iatrogenic injury is a critical surgical competency

objectives: SU28.12: Describe the applied anatomy of biliary system. Describe the clinical
IM5.8: Describe and discuss the pathophysiology, clinical evolution and
IM5.13: Enumerate the indications for ultrasound and other imaging studies
integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Choledocholithiasis across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
